title: alsophila lilianiae
intro: Alsophila lilianiae, also known as the Black Tree Fern, is a species of flowering plant in the family Cyathea, native to New Caledonia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Alsophila lilianiae include its potential to lower cholesterol levels, improve cardiovascular health, and reduce the risk of certain cancers. Herbal preparations of Alsophila lilianiae can be made by infusing the plant's fronds in hot water to create a tea, or by using the plant's extract in capsule or tablet form.
